comments: Approved after validating tasks/v0.7-m6-a-result-review-packet.json, tasks/v0.7-m6-a-execution-contract.json, tasks/v0.7-m6-a-execution-result.json, and `GIT_MASTER=1 git show --stat --name-status d907802`.
